programme.desc: On performance review day, the employees meet with Michael to discuss their work performances. The only thing on Michael's mind is his own impending review from his boss later that day.

programme.title: The Office: E-Mail Surveillance

programme.title: The Office: The Secret

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Steaks with Snakes
programme.desc: After an eventful first year together, Brianna and Bill plan a big blowout in honor of Bri’s 22nd birthday. They soon come to find that some of their culture clash issues from their first year are still alive and well.

programme.title: Movie: I Was Lorena Bobbitt
programme.desc: Lorena’s journey from a wide-eyed, immigrant bride to a battered wife, and an unlikely media sensation, with her ultimately emerging as a strong, thoughtful woman who has devoted her life to advocating for other abused women.

programme.title: Movie: Prosecuting Casey Anthony
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the investigation into Caylee Anthony's death from the point of view of the prosecutor.

programme.title: Movie: Drew Peterson: Untouchable
programme.desc: A police officer, who has been married three times, lands a girl half his age. While his relationship with his new girl blossoms, he is undergoing a bitter divorce from his third wife, who unexpectedly ends up dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Illinois police discover a footprint on a birthday card that could lead to the home invader who killed a man and attacked two young girls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A family realizes that their health problems could be related to an uninvited 'guest.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and an Aircraft Carrier
programme.desc: Guests dress for Kimberly's Halloween-themed ceremony, while a tiger attends Lindsay's country chic nuptials. Water, sand and driftwood adorn Crissy's wedding, while Amy decorates her aircraft carrier venue.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Daddy-Daughter Dilemma
programme.desc: Caitlin has her fitting now that her father is healthy enough to attend.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: More Money, More Problems
programme.desc: Having recently eloped, Lauren wants an ultra-sexy dress to wear to her family reception.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Til Dress Do Us Part
programme.desc: After losing 100 pounds, Stephanie wants to show off her new curves in a sexy wedding dress. Christine is looking for a traditional white gown to wear for her vow renewal ceremony. In for her fitting, Akisha is worried her dress won't impress her fiancé.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Ridge House
programme.desc: Scott Yancey deals with a scary, uninvited houseguest and has the entire crew working all night when he guts this totally out-of-date fixer.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Day Care House
programme.desc: When Scott buys a former day care he discovers that making a profit on it isn't going to be child's play.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Flood House
programme.desc: An expert real estate investor wants to flip a flooded house in a Las Vegas neighbourhood, but a dangerous discovery threatens to break the budget.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: The Waterlogged Cabin
programme.desc: A 'lurker' Zombie seems great initially, but has a lot of water damage under the surface. The team must battle against continuous rainfall in order to ensure their upgrades don't get washed away, which means a major revamp of the roof.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: The Bargain Bin
programme.desc: Ravaged by a hurricane and overtaken by nature, this low-cost home in need of low-cost renovation might be the perfect zombie for the team to do a quick, easy flip.

programme.title: Movie: Snitch
programme.desc: In order to free his son, who was framed during a drug deal, a father goes undercover for the DEA.

programme.title: Movie: The Lincoln Lawyer
programme.desc: A lawyer conducts business from the back of his Lincoln town car while he represents a high-profile Beverly Hills client.

programme.title: Lost Resort: Turn Up the Heat
programme.desc: Channelling ancestors turns out to be conflicting for guests and healer Ataseia. The Sexual Energy Healer threatens a burgeoning romance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: The Misery Index: No One Told Sal
programme.desc: Find out what happens when your parachute doesn't open, when your new parent is a sex doll, and what makes Jameela hide behind her podium.

programme.title: The Misery Index: Chase vs. Julie
programme.desc: Contestants guess the misery of some traumatic real-life events for the chance at $30,000.

programme.title: Movie: Identity Thief
programme.desc: A mild-mannered businessman travels to Miami to confront the woman who has been living it up since stealing his identity.

programme.title: Movie: Identity Thief
programme.desc: A mild-mannered businessman travels to Miami to confront the woman who has been living it up since stealing his identity.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Actually Quite Wholesome
programme.desc: Find out what Yamaneika Saunders does on blind dates, what bizarre get-rich-quick schemes Julian McCullough has up his sleeve, and how Jessimae Peluso brings Yamaneika to tears from laughter.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Champions Special
programme.desc: Megan Neuringer gets crazy eyes, Noah Gardenswartz knows what not to say during brain surgery, and Clayton English is convinced that a major pop star is watching him.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: That's My Wife
programme.desc: Amir K guesses the last book that Natasha Leggero read, Moshe Kasher does a mean striper impersonation, and Natasha reveals Moshe's favorite class in school.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: A Glittery Shoe
programme.desc: Sean Patton, Casey James Salengo, and Mehran Khaghani perform.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Gulp Fiction

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Hope Solo vs. Chyna the fan
programme.desc: Gabby Douglas goes undercover to secretly flip the script on a fan during a cheerleading competition, a baseball fan thinks they're participating in hall of fame ceremony but ends up in the hall of shame.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Chris Webber vs. Bo the Fan
programme.desc: Broadcasting legend Rich Eisen shows one fan there's no such thing as a free lunch, an interactive video game gets a little too realistic, and Chris Webber teams up with former teammate Lou Williams to get things popping.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Tara Lipinski vs. Valeria the Fan
programme.desc: A pair of NASCAR enthusiasts get driven crazy when superstar driver Kyle Larsen surprises them with the ride of a lifetime, and skating legend Tara Lipinski recruits her biggest fan to be a whistle blower.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Candace Parker vs. Delmy the Fan
programme.desc: Wrestling legend Bill Goldberg shows how shooting a commercial is backbreaking work, and football star Travis Kelce is back to test some products. Plus, one fan can't look up to WNBA superstar Candace Parker anymore.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Movie: Envy
programme.desc: Tim and Nick are two lifelong pals, working at a sandpaper factory. When Nick's latest invention becomes an instant hit, Tim becomes incredibly jealous and yearns to strike back.

programme.title: The Misery Index: Send in the Clowns
programme.desc: See a moped crash that'd make Wylie Coyote proud, a big family surprise for one Tenderloin, and Murr makes a very bad bet.

programme.title: The Misery Index: They Didn't Blur the Dog!
programme.desc: Find out why animals should never drive, and which NSYNC star makes a surprise appearance.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Cock a Doodle Do!
programme.desc: When Big invites Carrie to lunch, she ignores Miranda's advice and accepts his invitation.

programme.title: Movie: Sex and the City
programme.desc: A couple's plan to have a small wedding gets blown way out of proportion when the bride is asked to model wedding dresses for Vogue magazine. The groom's cold feet result in the bridal party going off to Mexico without him.

programme.title: Movie: Sex and the City 2
programme.desc: When Samantha is offered an all-expenses paid trip to Abu Dhabi, Carrie, Miranda and Charlotte trade in their day-to-day lives for a little rest, relaxation and shopping in the beautiful United Arab Emirates.

programme.title: Movie: Sydney White
programme.desc: After being thrown out of her mother's former sorority, a college coed moves in with seven socially challenged dorks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Breakfast, Lunch and Brunch
programme.desc: On this road trip revisit, Guy Fieri pops by an Oklahoma City diner known for their onion burgers. Then, a Baltimore brunch spot is stepping up their grit game, and a quirky joint in Los Angeles is still putting a spin on their diner dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Matters
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's stepping into some family kitchens. In Vancouver, B.C., the Chinese joint hand-pulling noodles and using ages-old family recipes for dishes like beef rolls.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tried and True
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a roadside shack in Kittery serving the same fried clam recipe since 1956. He also visits a go to burger spot in Washington, D.C., and an Italian joint that has been around for 45 years.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Inspiration
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits the road to meet chefs putting their roots into their menus. In Logan, Utah, a joint servin' Louisiana specialties like blackened chicken pasta and a marrow butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bagels, Biscuit and Boar
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diggin' into all kinds of flavour, starting in Santa Fe, N.M., at a pub serving comfort grub like chicken and biscuits and in-the-shell clam chowder. Also, a spot in Reno, NV, is on its game with a double elk chop and wild boar spaetzle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Tastier at Home
programme.desc: Four chefs walk Guy virtually through one of their dishes. In this episode, there's a French dip from Seattle, San Diego arancini, Boston kabobs and bangin' shrimp all the way from North Pole, Alaska.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mom and Dad
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's hanging out at real-deal mom-and-pop spots. In Logan, Utah, a family-run Indian joint hooked up to a gas station with Dad dishin' out specialties from his homeland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Faves, New Craves
programme.desc: In Annapolis, Maryland, two Irish brothers serving up food from their homeland with a twist, like Guinness fried oysters with homemade coleslaw.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Worldwide Delivery
programme.desc: On the takeout menu today is Roman-style pizza from Arizona, a wicked-hot burger from Boston, Hawaiian surf and turf and Trinidadian specialities out of Seattle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat Sampler
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into all kinds of different meats on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a carnivore haven stackin' sandwiches with dynamite duck and a pork trifecta. In Richmond, Va., a taco joint loading up out-of-bounds oxtail.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kansas City Barbecue Tour
programme.desc: An award-winning BBQ master serves up the Kansas City special: burnt ends.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kid Rock's Detroit Tour
programme.desc: Guy's taking Kid Rock's lead on a tour through D-town!

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat Lover's Paradise
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's signing up for a meat-crazed master class. In Portland, Ore., the craft-cooking family joint with a chef who butchers, cures, preserves and smokes everything in-house.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Port to Port
programme.desc: Guy's going from Portsmouth, New Hampshire to Portland, Ore. for righteous coast-to-coast flavor. In Oregon, a Spanish spot serving outrageous octopus and an homage to the chef's childhood.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Worldwide Delivery
programme.desc: On the takeout menu today is Roman-style pizza from Arizona, a wicked-hot burger from Boston, Hawaiian surf and turf and Trinidadian specialities out of Seattle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homeland Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's celebrating homeland favorites from all kinds of diverse cultures. In Richfield, Minn., the Mexican restaurant-market combo dishing out real-deal tacos al pastor and carnitas tamales.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: BBQ Bites And Southern Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing some barbecue and Southern comfort.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Blue Plate Specials
programme.desc: Guy Fieri searches out some off-the-hook specials, from fried pickles and homemade corn dogs in North Carolina and Italian beef in Chicago, to Los Angeles Governator's special breakfast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Playin' Chicken
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's playing a tasty game of chicken all over the country. In Alameda, Calif., a joint is cookin' it Nashville hot-style and putting a gourmet twist on a burger. In Lansing, Mich., the bird is served French-style at a pizza joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza Plus
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into the pie and other major mouthfuls. In Boston, a joint putting beer into their crust and then topping it with taco fixins and a steak-and-cola combo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Local Flavor
programme.desc: Guy visits an 85-year old Seattle joint for secret family chili, and a 100-year old California bar-turned-restaurant for crab cioppino and artichoke soup.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Steaks and Chops
programme.desc: Guy looks at burgers and steaks in San Francisco and Cambridge.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Viewer's Choice
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes to some great places viewers have suggested: a sixty-year-old legacy in Florida where even the fish goes in the smoker, a Hawaiian paradise outside of Seattle, serving up authentic island food that has mainlanders hooked.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fully Focused
programme.desc: Guy visits restaurants in Syracuse and Nags Head that have a definite direction.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Alright! It's Taco Night!
programme.desc: Make tacos every night with Rachael Ray's easiest fish tacos with red rice and black beans. Rachael tosses tilapia in a blend of spices, lightly fries it up and layers it with fresh Pico de Gallo. The dish is lightly spiced with hints of jalapeno.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Patio Party: A Dip for Everyone
programme.desc: Valerie hosts a summer get-together. The menu includes grilled vegetables with avocado yogurt dip and tapenade aioli dip.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Recipes Made With Love
programme.desc: The Kitchen is celebrating Mother's Day with recipes made with love! Geoffrey Zakarian updates a dish from his mom's recipe box with easy Grilled Lamb Chops and Vegetable Skewers.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Book and Wine Club
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her sister, Beth, get ready for their book club! First, Beth heads to a local bookstore, where she runs into bestselling author, Ann Patchett.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Farm Brunch Anniversary
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making a special brunch for the family to celebrate her and her husband Nick's third wedding anniversary. There's shakshuka with feta, Brussel sprout and bacon hash, roasted potatoes with paprika mayo and pocket pastries for dessert.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16 Minute Meals: Italian
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes a trio of marvelous 16-minute Italian meals. There's speedy pork scaloppini for a fast family dinner and snappy, saucy steak pizzaiola that the boys absolutely adore.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Double Care Package
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making care packages for her two daughters in college. She sends them homemade breakfast tarts, nut and seed brittle, salt and pepper crackers and cherry gummies for something sweet.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer Produce Relay
programme.desc: The Kitchen passes the summer produce and cooking easy, flavourful recipes. Katie Lee shares a grilled smoky tofu tacos with peach cucumber salad. She tosses a cucumber to Sunny, who makes easy mustard-pickled vegetables.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Feeding Hungry Boys
programme.desc: Trisha's nephew and his two college friends are visiting for the weekend. While the boys are having fun on the lake, Trisha whips up a protein packed meal of sausage and peppers.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Tex-Mex Entertaining
programme.desc: Ina Garten has all the bases covered when it comes to Tex-Mex entertaining. She makes a light and airy tres leches cake with berries and make ahead whipped cream, and her crowd-pleasing pork Posole.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Spice Games
programme.desc: Four chefs who like their food with some heat fight for the title of Spice Master by making a spicy high-end dinner with ingredients for bread pudding, playing Spree Ball to determine their dish's pepper and creating a spicy guilty pleasure.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Express Lane Extreme
programme.desc: Guy Fieri puts the chefs to the test with games of extreme limitations. First, the chefs make their best chicken dish using only eight ingredients. Then, Guy asks for a regional comfort dish with a seven-ingredient limit.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Comfort Food Cook-Off
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings four comfort food experts to Flavortown to compete in games that will push them out of their comfort zone. First, the chefs must make their signature dish while incorporating a list of mandatory ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Funny Food
programme.desc: Standup comics team up with Food Network all-star mentors in hilarious grocery games to earn money for charity. First, the comedians must make a late night dinner using only the ingredients they can fit in a very small shopping bag.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Did We Find Flight 370?
programme.desc: Investigators find a new clue about the missing Malaysia Airlines flight that disappeared in 2014. An astronaut spots something strange in the Sahara Desert. A mysterious orange sludge invades a remote village in Alaska.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: Stories on this episode include the face of Christ is found in a field in Hungary, a photo that claims to show who shot down a passenger jet in Ukraine and a sinister shape in the mountains of Afghanistan that leads investigators to a hidden genocide.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Sodom
programme.desc: Mike Barratt, an astronaut with NASA, explains the strange rings on the world's oldest lake that were photographed from the International Space Station. Since then, more rings have been seen and they continue to baffle scientists.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Raiders of the Holy Lance
programme.desc: A heavily armored force takes over one of Syria's most ancient archaeology sites, prompting fears that its relics are being stolen. Tanks appear to be facing off in Antarctica next to an unworldly object. A water reservoir in LA suddenly turns black.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Terror of the Ice Snake
programme.desc: Satellites discover a mysterious trail of sinister black objects in the snow and ice of Antarctica, and when experts discover that it's moving, they use cutting-edge tech to investigate who or what is behind this strange phenomenon.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks
programme.desc: When cameras record a strange creature in the wilderness perform an incredible feat of strength, some suspect it's hard proof of Bigfoot; using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if they've discovered the spawn of Sasquatch and Iron Man.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Escobar's Ghost
programme.desc: Moments before Pablo Escobar's abandoned luxury building is demolished, cameras capture footage of a ghostly figure in the window, and some believe it was the notorious drug lord himself; experts investigate who this phantom was and what happened to them.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Zombie Graveyard
programme.desc: Cameras capture something shocking in a cemetery: empty graves, as if the dead walked out in the middle of the night; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate what's behind this apparent evidence of zombie activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghosts of the Jungle
programme.desc: Investigations into strange occurrences caught on camera.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien of the Amazon
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction; using cutting-edge science, investigators try to explain this bizarre beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens of Hell Highway
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a highway swarmed with snake-like creatures and an unexplained ooze, experts investigate the origins of these alien creatures; the latest tech reveals where they came from and their top-secret purpose.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Into the Wild
programme.desc: While out for a run in the Montana wilderness, 22-year-old college student Kari Swensen is taken prisoner by two mountain men. When she learns of their twisted plans for her, she'll do everything she can to escape or die trying.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Blood in the Barn
programme.desc: Small-town gal Frankie Cochran thinks she's found the one in handsome David Gehrard. But as his behavior brings rising cause for concern, Frankie wonders if a secret from his past might hold more meaning than she first thought.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Locked Away
programme.desc: After a college graduate goes missing from her parents' home, investigators must rely on quick thinking and cunning police work, as they race against the clock to find her before it's too late.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: A Date with Evil
programme.desc: After a young military wife goes missing the investigation takes NCIS agents into the dark world of master and slave role-playing.

programme.title: 48 Hours: NCIS: Deadly Lies
programme.desc: The search for a marine who missed roll call launches NCIS agents into a world of calls, texts, a relationship built on lies, and an ill-fated case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Taken Away
programme.desc: Jessie Bardwell seemingly vanished from the Texas home she shared with her boyfriend, Jason Lowe. Fearing the worst, her father traveled to Texas to start the search for his daughter. Her body was later found on a farm wrapped in a sheet.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder on Red River
programme.desc: More than 15 years after a Texas woman was found dead, floating in a river, a former Marine and a filmmaker think they can find her killer. See if they can solve a cold case that has haunted her Texas town since Mother's Day, 2007.

programme.title: 48 Hours: NCIS: Deadly Lies
programme.desc: The search for a marine who missed roll call launches NCIS agents into a world of calls, texts, a relationship built on lies, and an ill-fated case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Operation Murder
programme.desc: Hear the final chapter in the investigation into the alleged murder-for-hire plot launched by two Houston doctors, and their relationship with a former U.S. army soldier who pretended to take a hit job.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Karrie's Choice
programme.desc: '48 Hours' tackles the question of whether one parent in a bitter custody battle could sway a teenager so strongly that they would help commit the murder of the other parent.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: A Date with Evil
programme.desc: After a young military wife goes missing the investigation takes NCIS agents into the dark world of master and slave role-playing.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Sinner and The Saint
programme.desc: When the sleepy town of Mooresburg, TN receives news that beloved teacher Margaret Jack Sliger is murdered on her farm, Hawkins County detectives are charged with finding the sinister perpetrator to bring their community justice.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: He'd Do It Again
programme.desc: When the well-liked South Bend native, Tim Moore, seemingly vanishes one cold November night, residents begin to realize they may not know the folks next door as well as they thought.

programme.title: Disappeared: American Gothic
programme.desc: When a bible teaching mom goes missing from her family's farm, Missouri investigators must decipher a cryptic handwritten note. They wonder if Lynn Messer was a troubled soul or the victim of foul play. A walk in the woods uncovers a mysterious skull.

programme.title: Disappeared: The Silent Son
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Macin Smith doesn't come home from school, his parents worry is he in danger. A note hidden in his wallet leaves his family troubled. Police attempt to piece together the puzzle, while his family vacillates between hope and despair.

programme.title: Disappeared: Born This Way
programme.desc: When Sage Smith, a transgender teen in Charlottesville, Virginia goes missing, police identify a suspect. But the investigation turns up evidence that forces detectives to look closer into Sage's inner circle to see if there are answers.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Hijacked
programme.desc: Kelley Branam's husband Jake is a Miami charter boat captain with high aspirations. Jake works long hours to support his new family but Kelley's suspicions run deep. Out of the blue, she decides to join Jake on a charter and is never heard from again.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Screams of the South Pacific
programme.desc: Serena Karlan leaves everything she knows behind to join her boyfriend, retired NBA champion Bison Dele, aboard his catamaran in the South Pacific. Serena is the happiest she's ever been, until Dele's estranged brother surfaces and throws them off course.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Lady of the Lake
programme.desc: Florence and Mark Unger love nothing more than vacationing at the lake with their two boys. Life is perfect, until an old sports injury pulls Mark into the depths of painkiller addiction. To keep her family afloat, Florence does whatever is necessary.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Last Breath
programme.desc: Living near Lake Minnetonka, MN with his wife and daughter, Jeff Skelton thinks his life is perfect until rumors of infidelity surface. Everyone has their breaking point. Jeff will do whatever it takes to keep his family from being pulled apart.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: They Call Me Animal
programme.desc: After three teens vanish, a Texas town's worst fears are realized when they're found dead. Details of a related robbery identify a suspect, but after a rattling jailbreak, the city must mobilize the largest manhunt in state history to nab the culprit.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Bloodshed in the Bayou
programme.desc: After a mother is brutally slain in her home, police collect bizarre evidence they hope will lead to a murderer. When a second body turns up, this Louisiana community fears a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: The Sinner
programme.desc: When a young husband is shot dead in his Morris, Alabama home, police initially believe it's a robbery gone awry. But once the town rumor mill swirls to life, authorities uncover a dark secret hiding between the pews of the local Baptist church.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: She Never Saw It Coming
programme.desc: A young Iranian mom and wife lands the perfect job with a Portland insurance agency. But her charm and intellect make her the focus for several male co-workers. Corporate intrigue turns to cold-blooded murder when she's found dead, shot in the head.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Vlad's Impalers
programme.desc: Vlad the Impaler, the inspiration for the fictional character of Dracula, was one of the most ruthless and brutal rulers in medieval Europe.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Pretend to Be a Cop
programme.desc: Peter Gibbs is a career criminal who is constantly lured to the dark side after every prison release, despite vowing to go straight. After a string of robberies catches up to him, he faces decades behind bars but refuses to go down without a fight.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Steal a Rich Woman's Jewelry
programme.desc: An elderly woman puts up a fight when an ex-employee tries to steal her rings, and is murdered.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Burn a Truck
programme.desc: Jermaine LeBron and his friends murdered a man in Florida and stole his expensive truck.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Home to Mother
programme.desc: After getting handed a stiff sentence for robbery, Robert Nielsen flees the brutality of prison by escaping and living under the radar with his family in California. But even they can't shield the young fugitive from the challenges of being on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got To Get Bike Parts
programme.desc: In central Florida in 1991, Marvin Carson settled an argument with rival gang member Richard Hawk by shooting him repeatedly with an AK47. Carson then went on the run. But when he returned to his home town, police were tipped.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Burn a Truck
programme.desc: Jermaine LeBron and his friends murdered a man in Florida and stole his expensive truck.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Commanders
programme.desc: This is the story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of the second Iraq conflict.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons
programme.desc: The story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of Iraq.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Natural Fit for a Fun Family
programme.desc: After moving to their forever home, a young family from College Grove, TN, is ready to build their dream pool. The Pool Kings accept the challenge, creating a tropical paradise with a massive waterfall, a swim-up bar and an oversized outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Everything But the Trellis
programme.desc: After moving into a lovely Santa Barbara home, that once belonged to a master gardener, this family with little interest in gardening decides to get help. Mike and Jim turn a garden path into a swimming lane, and the flowerbed into a stylish pool house.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Champagne Spa Wishes and Forever-home Dreams
programme.desc: Grandparents Joe and Beth want to add a dream pool to their forever home so they can host more family events. They hope the addition of this backyard oasis will complete their dream home and allow them to create many more memories outside.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cabanas and Cannonballs
programme.desc: A couple who recently moved into a new house in Austin, Texas, has decided it's finally time to build the family pool of their kids' dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Perfect Time for a Pool and Backyard Oasis
programme.desc: A Houston, Texas, family is ready to make their dream pool a reality, so the Pool Kings accept the challenge to take this family's outdoor fun to the next level with a dynamic, resort-style pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cliffside Dreams
programme.desc: A couple with a crew of rambunctious kids and a dream house in San Antonio is in desperate need of a pool. The kings design an expansive pool with a Baja shelf, swim-up bar, giant infinity edge and massive two-storey deck to enjoy the view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Heaven
programme.desc: After years of clearing and construction, Rene and Kelly are finally ready to put in a pool that completes their beautiful, 20-acre San Antonio property. Tony and Paul include a huge natural waterfall, stacked-stone spa and Baja shelf.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Modern Mountain Pool
programme.desc: A family enhances their spectacular mountain view with a breathtaking oversized pool featuring an infinity edge. An outdoor kitchen and firepit complete the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Overgrown to Over the Top
programme.desc: A Franklin, Tennessee, family has been living with an unfinished pool for over two years and is in desperate need of a pool rescue. The Pool Kings step in to transform this backyard from a state of chaos to something beyond their wildest dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Making a Splash in Arizona
programme.desc: Jeromey and Jay of Premier Pools create a personal resort for Arizona newcomers: Sally and Samer.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Top of the Mountain
programme.desc: Lucas heads west to Bountiful, UT to build a dream backyard on the side of a mountain. Faced with many challenges, Lucas creates a Tuscan themed pool complete with a spa, the biggest linear fire wall he's ever built and a grotto with a 23,000 pound lid.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: In Hot Water
programme.desc: After ten years of saving and dreaming for a pool, a couple wants Lucas to build the wow factor. The crew creates a giant double-pool feature with a connecting stream and several customized surprises to deliver the 'wow' and dismiss any doubt.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Paradise on the Bay
programme.desc: A couple from Snead Island, Florida asks the Lucas Lagoons crew to create a bayside paradise. This outdoor living space, pool, spa, fire feature and kitchen will be built without any of Lucas' signature rock work.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Fiesta de Laguna
programme.desc: It's fiesta time as pool designer Lucas Congdon and his crew are challenged to create a Mexican resort in a Venice, Florida residential backyard. Lucas encounters several design 'firsts' on his journey to infuse the flavors of Mexico into his creation.

programme.title: Cupcake Championship: Life With Molly Yeh
programme.desc: Gender reveal cupcakes are all the rage, so Food Network host and new mom Molly Yeh challenges four top cupcake designers to create their best revealing design.

programme.title: Cupcake Championship: From Science Fiction to Just Plain Science
programme.desc: In the first round, four cupcake makers take a mystical journey by combining two mythical beings into a new creature. Judges decide whose mythical mashup cupcakes advance them to the championship round.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Blue Belt/ The Playcare Heist
programme.desc: Bob's blue belt doesn't arrive in time for his martial arts class photo, so Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to get him a belt. When Keia realizes she accidentally left her favorite stuffed animal at Playcare, she and the pugs set off to rescue it.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Case of the Wrecked Recital / The Case of the Vanishing Vessels
programme.desc: When Prince Neel's sitar goes missing, Mira must track it down before great aunt Rupa finds out. Then, Mira goes on a mysterious underground adventure to find toy boats for a race.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Rock-A-Bye Birdie/ The Fly-Along
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must impress Captain Beakman when she joins them for a ride-a-long delivery. When Mimi the mockingbird sings K.C.'s lullaby she puts everyone at T.O.T.S. to sleep.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Out Foxed/ Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Freddy's status as the best hide-and-seeker is challenged after he and Pip lose to a baby fox. Pip and Freddy help K.C. earn her first Golden Feather on Cleaning Day.

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Art for Pug's Sake/ Winter Wonder-Pug
programme.desc: The pugs try to hang something of Bob's in a famous Italian art museum. Bingo and Rolly look for the first snowflake of the season while helping other animals prepare for winter.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Adopt-a-Palooza/ The Legend of Captain Wunderbark
programme.desc: When a puppy gets lost at Adopt-A-Palooza, it's up to the pugs, Keia and their new friend to find it. Bingo, Rolly and Keia go off in search of Captain Wunderbark's long-lost ship.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Kitty/ Polly Wants a Pug
programme.desc: When Bob brings home a lost kitty, Bing and Rolly try find her a home. While in Florida, Bingo and Rolly search for an old friend of Bob's.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: You've Gotta Be Kitten Me / Whale, Hello There
programme.desc: On Pip and Freddy’s first day, they deliver a kitten who mistakes them as her parents. When there is a two-ton baby whale delivery, the fliers compete in a fly-off for the task.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Back to Cool/ Baby Breakdown
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a baby Penguin to Pip's hometown. When Pip and Freddy break the conveyor belt at T.O.T.S. they are determined to fix it on their own.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Racing Rivals/ The Hapless Helpers
programme.desc: Minnie comes up with a special race that can include her visiting childhood friend. While the girls enjoy a spa day, the boys fill in as Happy Helpers.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Birthday Heros for Hero / Maple Cheer-Up
programme.desc: The pups must fix Hero's new birthday toy after Rolly and Keia accidentally break it. The Pugs head to Canada to save Bob's pancake surprise for Bonnie!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Shirt Rescue / A Pugatastic Day with Grandma
programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Blue Belt/ The Playcare Heist
programme.desc: Bob's blue belt doesn't arrive in time for his martial arts class photo, so Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to get him a belt. When Keia realizes she accidentally left her favorite stuffed animal at Playcare, she and the pugs set off to rescue it.

programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wants to give his daughter the best birthday ever. SpongeBob is assigned the task of finding out what she would like; SpongeBob is invited to a karate competition on the mysterious Karate Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanitation Insanity/ Bunny Hunt

programme.desc: When food Lincoln has saved in the fridge gets taken, a territory war in the fridge ensues.

programme.title: The Loud House: Legends/ Mall of Duty
programme.desc: Dad and Lincoln get on 'Legends of the Hidden Temple' and are excited for a day of bonding. Lincoln wants to go to the mall and has to bring his sisters along.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Ball O'Snags

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Fireballs from Space
programme.desc: Meteor shock, armies of snow monsters, blood red falls and tumbleweed invasions are all captured on video, examined and explained.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Weather Bomb
programme.desc: From geysers exploding in the middle of the city to clouds that look like they’ve been cut with a razor, witnesses freak winds that turn bridges to jelly, blood red rainbows and zombie trees.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Technicolor Weather
programme.desc: From Sapphire caves to bizarre blue lava and rainbow clouds, this episode exposes the invisible forces behind the strangest, most beautiful events the planet. Featuring forces that eat snow, create perfect clear cubes and cause walrus gatherings.

programme.title: Weird Earth: Ghost Ships and Blood Ice
programme.desc: A passenger on a helicopter films a weird red liquid seeping from an Antarctic glacier. A ship appears in the sky at the site of a notorious World War Two naval battle. And strange lights filmed dividing over an American city.

programme.title: Mayday: Helicopter Down

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Abandoned Places
programme.desc: When the cities of man are forgotten, Mother Nature moves quickly to reclaim what is hers. Nature’s attack on abandoned homes and buildings in Detroit, New Orleans and one Caribbean paradise is waged in three very different ways.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Animal Invaders
programme.desc: From the lack of predators, certain species take control and invade our ecosystem, such as the Burmese python, the snake-like fish in the Potomac and killer bees.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: The Birth and Death of the Planet
programme.desc: Tracing the series of events that developed the Earth from its birth in the solar system to where the Earth could be billions of years ahead from now.

programme.title: Tornado Alley: Real Time Tornado: Washington

programme.title: Tornado Alley: Real Time Tornado: Hattiesburg
programme.desc: On February 10, 2013 a multiple-vortex tornado barrelled through Hattiesburg, Mississippi and left a path of destruction through the city and the University of Southern Mississippi campus.

programme.title: Tornado Alley: Twisted Believers: The Weather Made Me Do It
programme.desc: People can be influenced by extreme weather in unconventional ways. Some think that the spirits of those killed by tornadoes live on, some think that extreme weather conditions are used by extraterrestrials and some think that elusive creatures come out.

programme.title: Tornado Alley: Real Time Joplin
programme.desc: The stories of survival of one of the deadliest tornados in more than 50 years.

programme.desc: Mary's friends and family have no idea about the horror that awaits them when they walk through her door. Annie cleans houses for a living, but is a hoarder in her own home.

programme.title: Hoarders: Joanne/ Kristy
programme.desc: The trauma of dealing with Joanne's hoarding was so bad for her daughter that she developed post-traumatic stress disorder. After experiencing the horror of assault, Kristi began shopping to escape her pain.

programme.title: Hoarders: Barbara G/ Fred and Mary
programme.desc: Barbara trolls for stuff in dumpsters while her hoarded home sits in a million-dollar neighbourhood where the neighbours look on in disgust. Fred and Mary live in a house filled with cobwebs and cockroaches.

programme.title: The First 48: Under One Roof/ Off Target
programme.desc: A grandfather is robbed and murdered in his bedroom for a 26-inch TV. Also, a drive-by shooting in Overtown left an innocent young woman dead.

programme.title: The First 48: Tracked
programme.desc: When a father of three is executed on his front porch, Gwinnett County Homicide discovers that those closest to him are hiding a dark secret.

programme.title: The First 48: Deadly Rap
programme.desc: When a shootout in an Atlanta rap studio leaves two men dead, detectives discover a vengeful motive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Ike and Mike
programme.desc: Ike's twin brother pays a visit to ask a favor. Meanwhile, the crew takes DNA tests and get some shocking results.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: Fire Choir
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme put the Q&A in quarantine with digital visits from Paul Soter and John Popper of Blues Traveler.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Closer
programme.desc: Learn which challenges Murr's considers his favorite, who has an impressive sneaker collection and why the crew was on high alert during this punishment.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Ike and Mike
programme.desc: Ike's twin brother pays a visit to ask a favor. Meanwhile, the crew takes DNA tests and get some shocking results.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Closer
programme.desc: Learn which challenges Murr's considers his favorite, who has an impressive sneaker collection and why the crew was on high alert during this punishment.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Ike and Mike
programme.desc: Ike's twin brother pays a visit to ask a favor. Meanwhile, the crew takes DNA tests and get some shocking results.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: The Misery Index: When We Smash
programme.desc: We prove why online dating is dead, and an officer flasher and a clumsy partier battle to be masters of misery.

programme.title: The Misery Index: UK vs US Special
programme.desc: After some heated UK vs US banter, Jameela and the Tenderloins find out once and for all which of these great nations is truly the most miserable. Plus, Jameela has a big surprise fail for the Tenderloins.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Pizza Panties
programme.desc: Vanessa Gonzalez gets hot and heavy over pizza, Rita Brent meets a six-year-old with more than just an old soul, and Gina Yashere comes face to face with a Jamaican pick-up artist. Plus, Orlando Leyba exposes a big scam at the gym.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Stage Five Clinger
programme.desc: Comedian Rita Brent reveals her number one tip for going number two at work, Kyle Erby thinks black folks should stick together, sometimes, and Vanessa Fraction gets an early sex-ed lesson. Plus, Owen Smith moves to LA to ditch a clinger.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Chris Redd Headlines
programme.desc: Funny man Chris Redd headlines as the always hilarious Donnell Rawlings jokes about his time in the military. Plus, Chanel Ali sets off new hair trends in the workplace.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Ronnie Jordan Headlines
programme.desc: Headliner Ronnie Jordan brings the heat tonight and is joined by funny woman Jade Catta-Preta as she shares the secret to relationship success. Plus, Blaq Ron gets a salsa lesson.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Outlaws 4
programme.desc: A failed prison break, a thief who marks his territory, a burglar who does her best work topless, a joy ride in a cop car and a dummy who calls the fuzz on himself.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 16
programme.desc: A music festival tent-surfer, beer-pong brawlers, a drunk girl in a dryer and a guy whose flaming shot goes bad.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performer 11
programme.desc: A rapper whose balance is worse than his rhymes, a flaming embarrassment of a TV chef, a dancer who lost her sexy a long time ago and a weather man with serious arachnophobia.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 14
programme.desc: Featuring a countdown of some of the dumbest acts on stage. Performers from a lion tamer to a woman with a special talent, each one is special in their own way.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Smartest Inventions 4
programme.desc: Inventions include a bra that doubles as a gas mask, a bib used for eating while driving and slippers with headlights.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Movie: She's All That
programme.desc: An athlete bets his friend that he can transform a geeky girl into a beautiful prom queen.

programme.title: Movie: Never Been Kissed
programme.desc: A journalist poses as a high school student for her first cover story, where she is forced to relive the hardest time of her life and become popular.

programme.title: Movie: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: When a fashion-driven sorority girl is dumped by her boyfriend, she decides to follow him to law school. Harvard doesn't know what to do when Elle and her dog take the Ivy League institution by storm.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Soul(mate) Searching
programme.desc: While on a spiritual quest to find balance in Bali, Kourtney gets some news that makes her consider a future with Scott. Kim and Khloe are determined to have an insightful psychic reading but get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Legally Brunette
programme.desc: Kim decides to follow in her father's footsteps and pursue her lifelong dream of becoming a lawyer, but worries she may have taken on more than she can handle.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Pet Peeve
programme.desc: Khloe’s mistrust of her mother’s boyfriend, Corey, resurfaces on a very awkward family trip to Palm Springs, leaving Kris hurt and confused about her daughter’s behavior. Meanwhile, the family stays with Kendall to escape the fires.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Unhappy Camper
programme.desc: Determined to fulfil one of North's lifelong dreams, Kim puts her survival skills to the test on an overnight camping trip in the wilderness. Malika heads back to Cleveland for the first time since True's birth and suspects Khloe is struggling internally.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Christmas Chaos
programme.desc: Kris reluctantly allows Kim to take over the annual Christmas Eve Party, but the holiday is in jeopardy when Kris learns Kim has invited an unwelcome guest. Khloe must come to the rescue when North’s beloved hamster unexpectedly dies and Kim can’t deal.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Heavy Meddle
programme.desc: Khole tries to mediate a fight between Kourtney and Kendall but only makes things worse. Meanwhile Kris makes herself at home in Kylie's new office space, so Kylie must show her mom who's boss.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Treachery
programme.desc: Khloe deals with some debilitating health issues, but her world is turned upside down when rumors surface of Tristan cheating with a close family friend, Jordyn Woods. Kim's husband brings his family and friends together.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Aftershock
programme.desc: After Tristan’s shocking betrayal, Kim and Kourtney take Khloe on a getaway to help her cope with the news. Khloe’s anger reaches a boiling point when she learns that Jordyn is speaking publicly about what happened.

programme.title: Movie: Home Again
programme.desc: A group of people are deported to Jamaica after growing up in Toronto, New York and London.

programme.title: Movie: Definitely, Maybe
programme.desc: The father of a ten-year-old girl tells the story of how he met and married her mother.

programme.title: Movie: Sydney White
programme.desc: After being thrown out of her mother's former sorority, a college coed moves in with seven socially challenged dorks.

programme.title: Movie: She's All That
programme.desc: An athlete bets his friend that he can transform a geeky girl into a beautiful prom queen.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Full Meal Madness
programme.desc: Guy Fieri gives the chefs 45 minutes to make three courses in each round. First, they do all the shopping for their full diner meal in miniature-sized carts, then are challenged by a ruthless pyramid game, then prepare their meals.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Worldwide Delivery
programme.desc: On the takeout menu today is Roman-style pizza from Arizona, a wicked-hot burger from Boston, Hawaiian surf and turf and Trinidadian specialities out of Seattle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Havana Hot Spots
programme.desc: Guy hits up the hot spots in Havana, Cuba. A neighborhood joint cooks up house-cured lamb and freshly-caught snapper. A house-turned-restaurant dishes out savory goat stew and Chinese fried rice.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Can Say That Again
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits three joints with the same name twice, such as Pok Pok, Tap Tap and Niko Nikos. He visits an old gas station in Houston, a Haitian restaurant in Miami Beach and a walk-up or dine-in place in Portland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chew and Brew
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbin' some grub cooked up at pubs! In Minneapolis, a big-time brewery cooking up dishes like righteous pulled pork and a killer brisket sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Infusion
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing grub infused with international flavours. There's a meaty spot in Wilmington, Delaware, putting Thai into sausage and Cuban into sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Return to Route 66
programme.desc: Guy Fieri takes an eastward tour of Route 66. In Flagstaff, Ariz., a family style restaurant serves scratch-made southwest favourites. In Chicago, a joint has been serving fried chicken on Route 66 since the 30s.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Wings 'n Things
programme.desc: Guy goes to a Mexican restaurant that tosses chicken wings with homemade adobo sauce.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Standout Seafood
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's reeling in all kinds of standout seafood! There's a restaurant-market in Vancouver that's combining sustainability with killer cooking including their bouillabaisse and salmon fish and chips.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Intercontinental Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy hits up world flavours tucked away in the U.S.A. In Los Angeles, a Korean-Mexican mashup serves up short rib tacos and spicy pork chimichangas. Also, a New Orleans-inspired joint cooks up Big Easy po' boys and crawfish mac and cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far-Flung Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's heading out to grab flavour from far and wide. In Santa Fe, N.M., a Southwest-Middle Eastern quick stop slingin' the shawarma and salmon souvlaki. In Kansas City, Missouri, a funky joint serving up outrageous Scandinavian specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Diners You Sent Me To
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads for three great diners that viewers recommended to him.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A World of Flavors
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tracks down great tastes from all over the world. He tastes foods ranging from Mexican to Greek.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Kraut to Couscous
programme.desc: Guy looks for some global flavour favourites in small joints all across America.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Where the Locals Go
programme.desc: Guy Fieri finds local favourites from a third generation cafeteria outside Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: South of the Border
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headed south of the border to Cabo San Lucas, Mexico. On the town's main drag, the taco joint that's turning out totally fresh octopus tacos and Guadalajaran-inspired sauces that'll knock your socks off.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Comfort Cookin'
programme.desc: Guy visits places where comfort food is done their own way. In Arizona, a Paris-trained chef prepares ham steak with red eye gravy, and a pastry chef in San Francisco has folks lining up for chili cheddar cornbread.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Comfort
programme.desc: Guy travels to find feel good food including mofongo, one Guy's all time favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Time Flavour
programme.desc: Guy's looking for plates packing a punch. He tries a unique version of pizza that involves jam as well as an oxtail stew.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Noodles and Quahogs
programme.desc: A Somerville, Mass. burger joint's mac and cheese burger; chorizo-stuffed quahogs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Time Favorites
programme.desc: Guy checks out places that are keeping the past alive. In Idaho, a landmark is serving up big plates, in Portland an old school lunch counter offers grilled cheese and in Miami, a family cooks up seafood like they did in Cuba.
