programme.title: Giada at Home: Family Comfort
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis is making some of her favorite family recipes, including Gnocchi with Butter Thyme Sauce, which her Aunt Raffy is also making at her home. Giada checks in with her mom in Rome while making Veronica's Stuffed Tomatoes.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Apples to Apples Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby Flay offers up brunch recipes and menu ideas for any occasion.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Farm Stand
programme.desc: Ina Garten lifts the veil on all her tips, sharing techniques and incredible elegant and easy recipes.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Valerie Bertinelli: Ingredient Hunter!
programme.desc: Valerie finds inspiration wherever she looks, including her local farm stand. Valerie finds ingredients for a plum slab pie, summer vegetable gratin, spicy cucumber calamari salad with spiced yogurt sauce, and a boozy frozen espresso.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Best of Summer Mega Salads
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is singing the praises of amazing main course summer salads that she has made over the years.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Kansas Cookin'
programme.desc: Ree creates awesome breakfast burritos packed with spicy egg-and-meat scramble.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Breakfast on the Run
programme.desc: It's the story of three awesome grab and go breakfasts. Breakfast cookies are a perfect jump start on the morning. Then there's a bountiful bento box with baked oatmeal and individual ham casseroles. Finally, Todd makes apple granola stackers.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Good Morning Drummond Ranch
programme.desc: Ree Drummond welcomes the morning at the Drummond ranch and makes a pairing of savory breakfast kabobs and sweet breakfast kabobs with shortcut doughnut holes and honey yogurt dipping sauce.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: New Classics
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is putting her own spin on some of her favourite dishes to make a fun meal for Nick and her dad. The menu includes Molly's Chicago dog meatloaf with mustard glaze, a salt-and-vinegar potato galette and wedge salads with bacon and feta cream.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Everything Retro Is New Again
programme.desc: Valerie and Tom love to reminisce about old times, but like all long-term relationships and old-school recipes, there comes a time to give them a little update!

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Taco Fusion
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges his ultra-talented chef buddies to come up with a menu that's inspired by both tacos and global cuisine. Aarti Sequeira makes sweet and crunchy apple pie taquitos and merges the fresh flavours.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Italian Feast on Fire
programme.desc: Michael Symon creates an entire Italian feast over coals on the grill, starting with fettuccine with smoked tomato sauce. His wife, Liz, mixes up creamy ricotta, lemon and herbs for stuffed squash blossoms, and they finish with lemon upside-down cake.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Al Fresco Feast
programme.desc: The Kitchen shares delicious meals to enjoy outside, including honey bourbon chicken pops and summer orzo salad. Plus, Alex Guarnaschelli makes the perfect light bite, summer berry Carpaccio, and Katie Lee prepares fresh and vibrant arugula lemonade.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Ultimate Chicken Challenge
programme.desc: There's no cluckin' around when four chefs come to Flavortown to compete in three chicken-themed rounds to prove their poultry prowess.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Teen Chefs
programme.desc: Four talented teen chefs are taking over Flavortown, and Guy Fieri gets things started by having them flip a chicken pot pie into a high-end dinner. Then, a roll of the dice decides the parameters of their international dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Summer Grillin' Games, Part 1
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites eight GGG winners to return to Flavortown Market for a summer grilling tournament. Each week, one chef will be awarded 'Best Dish, win $5,000 and move on to the next week's competition while the remaining chefs duke it out for survival.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Never Too Late for Love

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Trapped Below

programme.title: North Woods Law: Crossed Wires

programme.desc: A remote island retreat for two couples soon turns into a living nightmare, until only one couple can be accounted for months later.

programme.title: The Genetic Detective: The Phantom of Ramsey Street
programme.desc: Cece Moore investigates a series of unsolved rapes that occurred from 2006 to 2008, which haunted residents in Fayetteville, North Carolina.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Manhunt
programme.desc: This real life prison break captivated the nation last month and kept a small upstate New York town on edge for three weeks until convicted murderers Richard Matt was shot and killed and David Sweat was shot and captured.

programme.title: Cursed in Paradise
programme.desc: A remote island retreat for two couples soon turns into a living nightmare, until only one couple can be accounted for months later.

programme.title: The Genetic Detective: The Phantom of Ramsey Street
programme.desc: Cece Moore investigates a series of unsolved rapes that occurred from 2006 to 2008, which haunted residents in Fayetteville, North Carolina.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Gypsy Blanchard
programme.desc: A mother is found dead and her disabled daughter missing. As police investigate, they discover many secrets, lies, and betrayals.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: It's a Christmas day murder scene Portland detectives will never forget, a young woman bound, gagged and mutilated in a horrific manner. And when the killer then turns his sick sights on Homicide Detective Molly Daul, the stakes rise even higher.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Alaskan Temptress
programme.desc: A Washington community is shocked when PTA mom, Mechele Linehan is arrested for murder from a decade earlier in Alaska. Details of a seedy and sordid past emerge. But is this suburban mother a cold-blooded temptress or has she been wrongly accused?

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Darkest of Nights
programme.desc: In 2004, the small town of Craig, Alaska is shocked when police discover the charred body of beloved mother and wife Lauri Waterman. People have no idea who would want to kill her, until an unlikely witness reveals a sordid story of secrets and lies.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: In the Name of Love
programme.desc: Pvt. Tracie McBride has just arrived for military intelligence training when she's kidnapped from a laundry room at Goodfellow Air Force Base in Texas. A hunt for the missing soldier leads to a tale of horror involving a decorated war vet.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Stranger Than Fiction
programme.desc: Outgoing Jackie Galloway is found strangled and bound with ritualistic knots. Police investigate suspects in her inner circle but are shocked when a chance encounter with a prowler leads them to discover the murderer is a budding serial killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Mystery in the Swamp
programme.desc: The morning of his anniversary, Mike Williams goes duck hunting. When he fails to return home that afternoon, an all-out search commences. But it's only the beginning of a sordid mystery that will take close to 20 years to solve.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A series of bizarre 911 calls come in to police in two cities from a serial killer confessing his crimes. The man becomes known as the Weepy Voiced Killer, due to his strange, whining voice--and many young women will fall before he can be stopped.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Deadlift
programme.desc: A terrified neighbour calls 911 when she witnesses a young mother gunned down in her driveway. Police work to uncover a complex conspiracy that ripped the loving mother from her three children, just to keep dark secrets hidden.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Lost Angel
programme.desc: Two distraught women call 911 when they discover their sister brutally murdered. Soon, detectives uncover a stunning surprise and struggle to find a killer whose self-hatred drove him to commit the ultimate sin, in a precedent-setting case.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Don't Go in There
programme.desc: Beverly Puccio is brutally murdered and found at home by an oddly behaving ex-boyfriend. Detectives use security and traffic cam footage to piece together the last night of her life including an encounter with a mysterious stranger to find her killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Is That Blood?
programme.desc: When devoted mother Danielle Pruett goes missing in Tazewell, Virginia, police launch an investigation to find her. When her lifeless body is discovered in an open field, what starts as a web of lies and deceit becomes a race to track her killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Dying Words
programme.desc: Steven Galvin is dead and bodycam video captures the detectives hunt for his killer. As the case unravels, a surprise witness turns this case on its head. And a play-by-play of the crime will reveal new evidence that brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: I Did It
programme.desc: Michelle Kinney is found murdered in her apartment in Dubuque, Iowa. Her neighbours are puzzled as she had no enemies. Local detectives unveil a haunting truth, leading to a shocking confession from an unlikely murderer.

programme.title: American Monster: Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Todd and Rachel Winkler's life looks exquisite from the outside, but inside things are falling apart. Seen on video, their happy marriage hides the terrible secrets and mind-games that can only lead to one conclusion.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Al Capone
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St. Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by U.S. government, Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: John Gotti
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname `Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: 18th Street
programme.desc: Lou joins 18th Street gangsters, in prison and on the street, to learn why their deadly rivalry with the MS-13 is devastating El Salvador.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Commandos
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante travels to Manila, in the Philippines, to meet one of the world’s most ruthless prison gangs and find out more about Manila’s streets.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Burqueños
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante is in Albuquerque, to meet one of the world’s fastest growing prison gangs – The Burqueños.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Camorra
programme.desc: Lou visits Naples, a place with one of the oldest, most powerful gangs in the world – The Camorra. A number of bodies have recently been found in the city, causing world headlines.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Al Capone
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St. Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by U.S. government, Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Weaponology: Green Berets
programme.desc: Green Berets are the lords of unconventional warfare. From bolt-action rifles, to the latest air strike laser technology, Green Berets are the masters of multiple weapons systems. See how they operate under the most extreme conditions throughout history.

programme.title: Weaponology: SAS
programme.desc: The SAS go behind enemy lines and have revolutionised the global war on terrorism.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Living Under the Sea
programme.desc: Pool designer Lucas Congdon must create an outdoor water room in which a mermaid could live. Former clients in love with all things ocean ask Lucas to remodel the tiny pool in their new home that sits just yards away from the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Covington Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs work on Covington Church and find tambour doors, stairs and a jukebox. Mike and Tay build a locker bench, then the crew finds a propane spotlight.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Rising Sun Ranch
programme.desc: The Dawgs tackle a ranch house in Alderson, WV. Key items salvaged include stained glass and corbels. In the shop, Mike reuses timber to build a beam table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Trenton Central High School
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs team takes on a huge high school in Trenton, NJ. Key items found include fireclay sinks and oak cabinets. Mike and Tay build an N-shaped desk in the shop.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Portside Marina
programme.desc: The Dawgs save the bow and stern of a boat on Smith Mountain Lake in Moneta, VA. The team cuts up an old Chevy van for a commissioned wall art piece. New dogs Molly May and Stella make their debut.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: West Virginia Legacy Cabin
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work on saving the O'Dell family's hand-hewn log home. Mark also spends some time with his own father and visits a log cabin built by his great grandfather.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Picture Perfect Cabin
programme.desc: Mark's client has a painting of a log cabin he wants to replicate so the team sets out to find the perfect cabin for the job. After settling on a cabin from an old project, the Barnwood Builders rebuild the structure with its huge logs in Texas.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Finished Product
programme.desc: Mark Bowe visits finished cabins he helped build in Montana, Texas, South Carolina, West Virginia and North Carolina. Then, there's a big surprise waiting for him in Gatlinburg, Tennessee.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Killer Views
programme.desc: A family of four build their dream home overlooking the Atlantic Ocean on the eastern most point in the United States in Lubec, Maine. Later, a pro snowboarder and his wife prepare to move from their yurt in Whitefish to build their off-grid home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: High Altitude Hideout
programme.desc: Adventure seeker Joey Caiafa sets out to build a mountaintop hideout outside of Leadville, Colorado. He enlists the help of his friends and an architectural designer to trick out the solar-powered space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home
programme.desc: A man turns his dreams into reality with a spacious, solar-powered dovetail log cabin made from trees harvested off his 100-acre woods.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Windy Mountain
programme.desc: A snowmobile guide and his wife build an off-the-grid cabin by the river and mountains of their beautiful home state of Wyoming. The build includes a 272 square foot cabin with a small shop and garage. The team faces many challenges including snow.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cliff House
programme.desc: Off-the-grid contractor Gregg Smith battles the elements to build a cliffside retreat for a family wanting to reconnect in the Sierra Nevada Mountains. But for Gregg and his team, building in the middle of nowhere presents its challenges.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: For Whom The Cheese Melts: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic fondue show with some cheesy science and a completely new recipe, because he really didn't like the first one that much anyway. The Lady of the Refrigerator returns and boy, is she mad!

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Use Your Noodle: The Reload
programme.desc: Reloading an earlier episode, Alton revisits cold-water pasta cooking, and shares his recipe for Cacio a Pepe.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Forgione vs. McClain
programme.desc: Iron Chef Marc Forgione faces off against challenger Shawn McClain, the executive chef at Sage, at Aria Resort and Casino in Las Vegas. Martin Yan, Ching-He Huang and Adam Richman are the judges for this battle.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Garces vs. Medina
programme.desc: Mexico City native Chef Julian Medina enters Kitchen Stadium to challenge the master of Latin food, Iron Chef Jose Garces.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto Vs. Tila
programme.desc: Jet Tila, a Guinness world record holder, challenges Iron Chef Morimoto.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon vs. Crenn
programme.desc: Dominique Crenn has come to Kitchen Stadium to take on the ultimate challenger Iron Chef Symon.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Zakarian Vs. Wolen
programme.desc: Chicago Chef Lee Wolen busts out of his shell for a battle against Iron Chef Geoffrey Zakarian that's anything but quiet. Judges Nancy Silverton and Simon Majumdar are on hand to determine the winner.

programme.desc: West coast chef, Jason Knibb challenges Bobby Flay to a special seafood showdown.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amsterdam
programme.desc: Look no further than the picture-perfect city of Amsterdam for the best eating in the Netherlands. Built on simple classics like bitterballen and haring, Andrew Zimmern discovers just what makes the Dutch destination so delicious.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Montreal
programme.desc: Known as the City of Saints, Montreal, Canada, is blessed with a cuisine formed by global flavours. From poutine to smoked meat to hand-rolled bagels, Andrew Zimmern digs in to the iconic eats that keep the hungry heading to Quebec.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago
programme.desc: Andrew visits the windy city and tastes classic Chicago deep dish pizza and many other great dishes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Milwaukee
programme.desc: Milwaukee may be known for its beer, but it's also home to mouth-watering classic American foods. From cheese curds and bratwurst to frozen custard and butter burgers, Andrew shows us why this Midwestern city is a great food town.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Los Angeles, California

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: The Newsroom

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Sanctuary

programme.title: Modern Family: Moon Landing

programme.title: Modern Family: Starry Night
programme.desc: Phil and Claire each tackle one of their kids' school projects. Meanwhile, Jay and Mitchell set out on their traditional father-son outing to see the meteor showers.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Home Invasions

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Hunting Ground

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Child's Welfare

programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs - back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: The Office: The Return
programme.desc: Oscar returns from his vacation with mixed emotions on whether or not he wants to be a part of the office. Meanwhile, Andy takes advantage of recent events to get closer to Michael. Jim turns to Karen and Pam for help to stage a prank on a new target.

programme.title: The Office: Ben Franklin
programme.desc: Acting on bad advice he received from his friend Todd Packer, Michael brings two 'adult' performers into the office in honour of Phyllis's wedding shower. Meanwhile, Karen confronts Pam about her past with Jim.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: White People Can't Dance and the Three Daves
programme.desc: Dave explores the myth that white people can't dance and charts his emotional growth.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Kneehigh Park and Making da Band
programme.desc: Dave takes a closer look at the Diddy-driven show 'Making da Band'; musical guest Snoop Dogg and appearances by Q-Tip and Wyclef.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums at School and Wrap it Up Box
programme.desc: Dave plays a crack addict who visits an elementary school to give an anti-drug speech.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Blackzilla and Playa Haters' Ball
programme.desc: Dave takes Japan by storm in the sci-fi adventure 'Blackzilla;' musical guest The Roots.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Show Business and Lil Jon in Love
programme.desc: Dave finally gets his chance to meet the great and powerful Show Business. Later, Dave introduces a group of monsters victimized by discrimination.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mad Real World and Ask a Gay Dude
programme.desc: Dave imagines the TV show The Real World with an all black cast and only one white guy.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Lost Episodes
programme.desc: After getting a big new contract, Dave Chappelle sets out to get revenge on all those who have wronged him. Meanwhile, everyone seems to be trying to charge Dave more money for everything now that he is rich.

programme.desc: Dave looks at TV gambling sensation the World Series of Dice; Eddie Griffin guest stars with musical guests Common and Kanye West.

programme.desc: Dave thinks Oprah is having his baby and shares his experience as a member of a jury pool on the OJ trial; musical guest Wyclef.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mandela Boot Camp and the Time Haters
programme.desc: Dave visits Nelson Mandela's bootcamp for teens.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Zapped and It's a Wonderful Chest

programme.desc: Dave introduces The Love Contract and True Hollywood Stories featuring Rick James.

programme.desc: Crackhead Tyrone Biggums returns as a guest on Fear Factor; special guests Joe Rogan, Nick Cannon, and Wayne Brady.

programme.title: The First 48: Deadly Ride/ Wrong Place, Wrong Time

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy: Fight Like a Mother
programme.desc: Getting the wife of an influential Order man out is a challenge as her home is surrounded by Order members tasked to keep watch over her day and night.

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy: The Cost of Temptation
programme.desc: Two of Jessica and Shanell's siblings are being lured back to The Order by their father, Daniel.

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy: The Prophet's Son
programme.desc: Jessica meets with Raymond Jeffs, son of Warren Jeffs, the notorious leader and prophet of the FLDS polygamist cult. Raymond pleads for their help getting his only brother out of the group.

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy: Forbidden Love

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy: Family Under Fire
programme.desc: Jessica and Andrea receive word from Jesse, a father desperate for his family to escape the polygamous group known as the AUB.

programme.title: Intervention: Family of Addicts: Tom and John
programme.desc: John and Tom are brothers who spent their formative years working with their parents and grandparents in a successful business. While they appeared to be a close knit, hard-working family, a dark family history of drug abuse entrapped the brothers.

programme.title: Intervention: Jason
programme.desc: Jason was born to a strict Southern Baptist family, and when his mother revealed she was a lesbian they were banished from the church. Left with no supervision, Jason turned to drugs and alcohol.

programme.title: Intervention: Leslie
programme.desc: Leslie is a Sunday school teacher, PTA member, soccer mom of three and a raging alcoholic. After countless arrests and DUIs her husband is hoping to find help for the mother of his children before it's too late.

programme.title: Intervention: Diana
programme.desc: Diana exchanged her maternal apron for an alcohol and meth addiction, which is ruining her marriage, family and sense of self-respect.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Lost Resort: Unmasked Meltdowns
programme.desc: When Robin and Christine's fighting annoys the rest of the group, Meco and Claudia give them a piece of their mind. An unlikely friendship forms when the group gets vulnerable. A romance among the guests gets steamy.

programme.title: Lost Resort: Turn Up the Heat
programme.desc: Channelling ancestors turns out to be conflicting for guests and healer Ataseia. The Sexual Energy Healer threatens a burgeoning romance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: In Poor Taste Buds

programme.title: Botched: Vagina Bomb!
programme.desc: Transgender star Kimber James asks the doctors to fix her botched breasts, nose and vagina. Paul tackles a tragic deviated septum and internet celebrity Renee Talley wants her famous botched bottom fixed.

programme.title: Botched: Like a Surgeon
programme.desc: A reality star seeks help to fix her botched boobs and stomach after her former plastic surgeon is allegedly killed by an unhappy patient. Paul fixes a pig-ish' nose and Terry struts his stuff with a celebrity impersonator.

programme.title: Botched: Most Outrageous Patients
programme.desc: Take a look at the top 10 most outrageous patients.

programme.title: Botched: Man Boobs
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a mother who looks like she's been pregnant for 12 years, Dr. Nassif takes on a woman who hasn't been able to close her mouth since college and the doctors meet with a gambler with a serious case of man boobs.

programme.title: Botched: Short Changed at the Nipple Bank
programme.desc: A transgender woman who got her rhinoplasty in Mexico seeks Dr. Nassif's help to fix her collapsed nose. Then, Dr. Dubrow tackles a botched double mastectomy, and a young woman travels from the UK to look faker than fake.

programme.title: Botched: Blowflish Lips and Crab Claw Bits
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif helps a woman with blowfish lips, while Dr. Dubrow takes on a difficult case of crab claw breasts. Later, a male model travels all the way from Prauge in pursuit of perfection.

programme.title: Botched: Seeing Double
programme.desc: A fitness enthusiast and nasal spray addict wants Paul to fix her nose, and a woman with deflated boobs comes to Terry for help. Later, the doctors meet the world's most identical twins.

programme.title: Botched: Plastic Fantastic
programme.desc: After almost dying during a procedure in Ecuador, an ex-Playboy model wants a second chance to fix her neck and nose. Terry tries to help a nurse with one big boob instead of two, and reality star Angelique Morgan wants to be even more plastic.

programme.title: Botched: Pinched Perfect
programme.desc: Paul helps a singer find his voice again with a revision rhinoplasty, and Terry reconstructs the chest of a young mother whose surgeon put in two different sized implants. Later, the doctors assist a woman with stretched earlobes.

programme.title: The Daily Pop

programme.title: Botched: Playground Trauma and a Pint-Sized Mama

programme.title: Botched: 2,000CCs and Counting
programme.desc: A frightening surgical mishap in Colombia leaves a woman with franken-tits and the doctors salvage a man's dog bitten nose. While an Australian woman has a severe case of boob greed.

programme.title: Botched: Nothing Butt Trouble

programme.title: Botched: Muscles, Tucks and Forehead Flaps
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif takes on a patient who tried to treat her own skin cancer and ended up with a hole in her nose while Dr. Dubrow tackles a body builder's deflated breast.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Summer Grillin' Games, Part 2
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's summer grilling tournament continues with only seven GGG winners remaining. It's all about the boardwalk as the chefs make summer seafood dishes and spicy seaside sandwiches.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Summer Grillin' Games Part 3
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's Summer Grillin' Games continue, this time with carnival-themed games and dishes. Guy gives the chefs a funnel cake-sized twist by putting them in pairs to make a fried sweet-and-savory duo and a cheesy carnival classic.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Summer Grillin' Games Part 4
programme.desc: Guy Fieri treats the remaining five chefs to a Flavortown vacation, and one chef's destination dinner has a chance to earn 'Best Dish' an instant $5,000 and a spot in the finale. Then, the bottom four chefs compete to see whose trip will get cut short.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Summer Grillin' Games Finale
programme.desc: For the four chefs in Guy Fieri's summer bash finale, a beach ball determines which aisles the chefs get to shop for their summertime guilty pleasure. Then, they find feature ingredients for their ultimate grilled feast in an epic scavenger hunt.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat Bobby Flay: Battle 1
programme.desc: For this tournament event, 16 champions are back to defeat Chef Bobby Flay. In the premiere battle, a strangely sweet sandwich and beautiful seafood await the champs. Round two involves an unusual beef jerky product and a twist on hummus.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Going Global
programme.desc: Chef Richard Blais recruits TV personality Laura Vitale to try to knock Bobby Flay down a peg or two. They enlist the help of global food enthusiasts Chef Reza Setayesh and Chef Andy Gaynor to make Bobby's world spin.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Have Merci!
programme.desc: All bets are off in this fantastic showdown between French caterer Gui Alinat and his Dallas counterpart Kevin Ashade. Both of them will first be judged by Josh Capon and Alex Guarnaschelli before moving on to the next competition.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Do or Die
programme.desc: It's all on the line when Tex-Mex master Gregory Webb faces off against New Jersey's Peter Morris in this battle for supremacy. Tough New York City chefs Scott Conant and Geoffrey Zakarian have the call on who's got the skills to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: All in the Family
programme.desc: Sassy Miami chef Mika Leon brings the heat against Atlanta chef Michael Bertozzi. Chef Carla Hall and actor Jesse Tyler Ferguson decide who has what it takes to join their modern family for a food fight against Bobby Flay.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Fresh Festive Feast

programme.title: The Kitchen: Fiesta in A Flash

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer Produce Relay

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Game wardens enforce the law across Texas. A hunting club has a trespassing issue. People are caught attempting to illegally cross the Rio Grande. An argument between neighbors is mediated. Fishermen receive citations on the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Lying Dogs
programme.desc: The Game Wardens patrol the beach, lake and land, as summer is in full swing. Wardens educate a dog owner about leaving pets in the sun. An under-age drinker tells too many lies. Wardens inspect novice jet skiers on a busy recreational lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Stag Poaching
programme.desc: Texas Game Warden Gould responds to the call about an exotic red stag that was shot. In Hunt County, a plethora of warrants are dispersed for unpaid fishing violations, while Warden Flores and Williams join forces on the last day on patrol.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Family Lies

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Thrill of the Hunt
programme.desc: A tense confrontation ensues when Wardens Scott and Gould respond to a call about an illegal deer hunting case. A pair of raccoons find their way to a gas station and must be trapped, and Warden Boone handles a disgruntled hunter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In Hot Water
programme.desc: Dockery responds to a call about an alligator found near a residential area. The game wardens find blood in a hunter's car after a hunter claimed he didn't shoot anything. Boone follows up on a call about five racoons making their way into someone's home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Shrimp and Run

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Dream Realized

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: You Are Free

programme.desc: Captain Lee makes a decision regarding the crew's re-configuration which rocks the team to its core. Matt's date with Brianna has an unexpected outcome when they mistakenly arrive at a nude beach. Jen grows weary with the unfair treatment.

programme.title: Below Deck: 100 Feet From Catastrophe
programme.desc: Nico is pushed to his breaking point under the leadership of boson EJ. Matt continues to unravel after his date with Brianna which causes problems for Kate. Captain Lee makes a staffing decision. Jen feels under-appreciated in her department.

programme.title: Below Deck: Hot Mess Express
programme.desc: Captain Lee, Kate, Nico and Matt have their hands full when eight big personalities from Texas come on board. Matt attempts to step up his cooking game. Bruno decides to help the interior, only to discover how unorganized they are.

programme.title: Below Deck: Only Doing It for the Money

programme.title: Below Deck: You Don't Mess With the Primary

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Hell Week
programme.desc: The Old Man has a chance to buy a piece of history, lost footage of the legendary president Franklin Delano Roosevelt and later Corey and Chumlee are challenged to compete in a parking lot obstacle course designed just for them.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Teacher's Pet
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars set their aim on a World War II era bomb-sight. Corey and the Old Man check out a stock ticker from the 1930s. Antwaun shows interest in learning the pawn business, and Chumlee agrees to teach him.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bossy Pants
programme.desc: A panel off the world's fastest airplane, the SR-71 Blackbird, soars by the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bang Bang
programme.desc: Join the front lines as Rick gets spooked when a WWII embalming kit invades the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Birthday Blues
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are entertained by a military ID that has been signed by Marilyn Monroe. Another customer brings in a first edition of Beethoven's 6th Symphony.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Apocalypse
programme.desc: A pair of vintage Aerosmith tour shirts jam into the shop. Then, Rick and Corey check out a U.S. Navy foghorn. Later, Corey braces himself for the apocalypse when he checks out a state-of-the-art survival vehicle, built to fight zombies.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Up, Up and Away
programme.desc: An original Superman costume catches Rick and Corey's attention. Rick wants to fetch a good price for a retro computer, while Corey determines the value of two vintage music posters. Chumlee tries to get a good deal for a 1980s Rhodes piano.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawning Reagan
programme.desc: A rare double lock musket finds its way to the shop. An autographed photo of Laurel and Hardy is offered to Rick. A foam Ronald Reagan head has Corey intrigued.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Can't Pawn Me Love
programme.desc: The Venetian Hotel hosts some pricey illustrations from the children's book, 'Where the Wild Things Are,' which greatly intrigue Rick. At the shop, an ultra-rare Beatles vinyl collection impresses Chum. Chum also finds an antique hot dog bun warmer.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Fully Vested
programme.desc: A pretty pair of 18th century breechloading pistols mosey into the shop. A seller pops by with a paperweight by renowned glass artist, Paul Stankard. A custom, harmonica-holding vest that was made for Blues Traveler's front man, John Popper, stuns Chum.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Off the Grid
programme.desc: Rick explores a Funko Pop! Mystery Box, while Corey and Chumlee enlist Rick Dale to rescue their fire alarm system. Then, the Pawn Stars get on their motorcycles to ride to Oregon to spruce up Rick's ranch with some new equipment.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sign of the Times
programme.desc: Rick Dale joins Rick to prove to Corey that he struck oil with an old Gulf sign. Then, a 1930s collectible from the Indy 500 sends Chumlee racing, and Corey snoops out what might be a Charles Schulz original illustration of Charlie Brown, and more.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Million Dollar Deal
programme.desc: A signed letter from a former president, a giant bird egg and a violin clock enter the shop. Plus, Rick heads to London to check out a work of art with a million-dollar asking price.

programme.title: American Pickers: Deuce Digging
programme.desc: The guys hit the alleys of small town Illinois where Mike bids on the rusty frame of the most famous hotrod of all time. The guys get unprecedented access to a family's dusty collection.

programme.title: American Pickers: Risks and Rewards
programme.desc: In Detroit, Frank takes a big risk on one of the greatest pieces he's ever seen. Plus, Mike acquires a Purple Heart along with a very special mission.

programme.desc: A chic jewel thief in England falls in love with one of her marks.

programme.desc: A man files for divorce when his wife has an affair with the married man she loves.

programme.title: Movie: Marie Antoinette

programme.title: Movie: Romeo and Juliet
programme.desc: Two teenagers from feuding families fall in love at first sight and try to be together.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Close Shave
programme.desc: When Booker shirks his responsibilities, helping Mr. Arthur at the local barbershop to attend a concert promoted by Chris Spring-Lake, Mr. Arthur recruits Raven to do her son's work.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Hoop Streams
programme.desc: When the school's basketball team makes it to the National Championship, Tess rallies everyone to help her host a live telethon to raise funds for the team to travel.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Slammed
programme.desc: When Booker becomes responsible for choosing who will represent the class at the district poetry slam, Nia thinks she has a guaranteed spot on the team. Meanwhile, Raven and Chelsea start a DIY renovation on their new business space.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Trash a Friend?
programme.desc: When Coop and Fred go on a recycling spree to prove they care about the Earth, they accidentally throw away a sculpture that was donated for Charlotte's fundraiser.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Have Mom Bust You Out?
programme.desc: When Mr. Walker gives Cami Saturday detention for something that wasn't her fault, she'll have to miss her big dance competition, unless she sneaks out. With her family's help, Cami attempts the most daring detention escape any student has ever tried.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Lose Your Bestie?
programme.desc: When Cami tells Delaware she doesn't want to take up a new hobby with her, Pam takes advantage and tries to steal Delaware as a best friend.

programme.title: Jessie: World Wide Web of Lies

programme.title: Jessie: Creepy Connie Comes a Callin'
programme.desc: Jessie believes a math tutor she finds for Luke will be the perfect scholarly influence. To Jessie's dismay, she turns out to be a lovelorn teen fascinated with Luke. Meanwhile, Ravi is convinced he can predict the future with his Mystery Ball.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Lava at First Sight
programme.desc: When Ava's brother visits Camp Kikiwaka Lou develops a big crush on him.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Dress to Express
programme.desc: When Levi makes a documentary to see how a person's style influences people's perception of them, he has Nia, Tess and Booker change up their style of dress which leads to surprising results.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: When Harry Met Sydney
programme.desc: Syd finds out her childhood best friend, Harry, is moving back to Portland. When Olive meets Harry, she thinks Harry is the perfect match for Sydney.

programme.desc: When the kids mistakenly believe Principal Walker is seeing someone else, they set a plan in motion that ends up ruining his surprise for Jenna.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: The Note

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sorry to Father You

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Foreign Identity

programme.title: Jessie: To Be Me or Not to Be Me

programme.title: Jessie: Toy Con

programme.title: Raven's Home: What About Your Friends?
programme.desc: When Booker’s new friends try to influence him to try vaping, he turns them down, however later takes the fall when they get caught and claim that the vape pen belongs to Booker.

programme.title: Raven's Home: In-Shoe-encer

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Flugelball-A-Rooney

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Frame-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Ridgewood's mascot has been vandalized, and the Rooneys all become suspects. Meanwhile, Parker has the day off from school and gets into trouble at home with Reggie.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Diners and Daters
programme.desc: Trish gets a job at a diner, the gang goes for lunch and Austin instantly falls for one of the waitresses. She tells him she doesn't have time to date, so Austin gets a job at the diner to win her over. Dez continues trying to fend off Mindy's attention.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Successes & Setbacks
programme.desc: The gang stays up all night rehearsing for Austin's demo record with Jimmy Starr, but when Austin pushes it too hard, he strains his vocal cords. Ally, Trish and Dez take him to the doctor where he is faced with a choice that could affect his future.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Xander Says Goodbye
programme.desc: Emma and Xander are forced to make some tough decisions when his dad wants him to leave camp for football training. Meanwhile, Emma, Ravi and Lou put him through some drills.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Luke's Back
programme.desc: Luke reunites with his siblings to get some summer school help from Ravi. Meanwhile a turf war erupts between Camp Kikiwaka and the rival camp across the lake.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Mixed-Up Motor Lab/ Wishy Washy Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey invents a new Motor Lab to add new upgrades to the gang's roadsters. The Happy Helpers offer their services to make Bigby Towers' windows sparkle and shine.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's New Mouse House/Millie and Melody's Sleepover!

programme.desc: The Pugs make a hospitalized child's wish come true; The Pugs search for Bob's Gift.

programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that Ramses III was murdered, and experts use cutting-edge technology to investigate the truth behind the secret conspiracy to kill the last of Egypt's great pharaohs.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Forbidden City of the Deep
programme.desc: Experts investigate the world's oldest sunken city and reveal the secrets lost to the ocean almost four thousand years ago.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Greatest Treasures
programme.desc: The world's leading experts on ancient Egypt reveal the greatest treasures and discoveries of the great empire of the Nile.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Animal Mummies: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: Ancient Egypt's animal mummies are one of antiquity's darkest mysteries, and today, innovative new imaging technology reveals what's inside these strange relics. The shocking truth challenges everything we know about worship in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Native Americans and Star People
programme.desc: Astonishing new evidence and modern-day UFO sightings have experts rethinking ancient otherworldly Native American myths.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Extraterrestrials and Sacred Sites
programme.desc: Startling evidence suggests contact with interstellar travelers in the distant past may have influenced mankind and many of our sacred sites.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Area 52
programme.desc: Few have ever heard about the ultra top-secret military base in the remote deserts of Utah known as Area 52.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Nazi UFO Secrets
programme.desc: Shocking evidence reveals the development of secret Nazi weapons not long after an alleged UFO crashed in Germany's Black Forest. UFO experts investigate whether the US government co-opted this technology for our own space and military programs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: A look at first-hand accounts of mysterious, unknown objects in the skies from pilots and astronauts.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFO Tech
programme.desc: Technology has transformed the way we live with artificial intelligence, high-energy laser, antigravity technology and alien-looking aircraft. We discuss if these advances are due to human effort or contact with UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFO Abduction
programme.desc: Only recently have researchers begun to understand and investigate the phenomenon of alien abduction. While today such claims are dismissed as hoax or delusion, there are time-tested, landmark cases that mainstream scholars struggle to refute.

programme.title: American Monster: A Mother's Work
programme.desc: Never-before-seen home movies reveal the fabulous lifestyle of Lanny and Donna Horwitz raising their only son Radley in their Florida mansion. But when their lives are upended by a ghastly shooting, everyone in this eccentric family becomes a suspect.

programme.title: American Monster: Falling Down
programme.desc: Alene and George Jenkins are the perfect couple living a perfect life. When their desire for children leads them to adopt a son and a daughter it seems their family is complete. But instead it triggers a dark spiral ending in an unspeakably awful crime.

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When outgoing Beth Spaulding meets shy Jason Risenburg it seems that love has conquered loneliness and the two quickly marry. Illness and bad luck push their happiness to the brink, triggering a tornado of lies and deception that tears them apart.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Horror I Don't Remember
programme.desc: Sherry Shafer never had a good relationship with her younger brother, Brian Britton, but she never expected to lose everything because of him. Today, all she has left is the fear that one day he will return to finish what he started 26 years ago.

programme.title: American Monster: Stay with Me
programme.desc: A look at killers who are hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Test of Patience
programme.desc: The unsolved murder of a teenager torments a small midwestern city for decades until a relentless team of investigators finally finds the clue that breaks the case wide open.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Predator in the Woods
programme.desc: Two young girls are lured into a deadly trap by a vicious sexual predator. One survives and helps police bring her best-friends killer to justice.

programme.title: American Monster: Stay with Me
programme.desc: A look at killers who are hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Test of Patience
programme.desc: The unsolved murder of a teenager torments a small midwestern city for decades until a relentless team of investigators finally finds the clue that breaks the case wide open.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Deadly Deception
programme.desc: A father of four is gunned down during a vicious attack, but as police investigate the murder, they discover that nothing about the crime is what it appears to be.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Cop and the Killer
programme.desc: When Walt Chavis joined the police force, he was prepared to risk his life, but he never imagined the greatest threat he would face would be his own brother or that one day he would be forced to choose between his duty and his family.

programme.title: American Monster: Looks Can Kill
programme.desc: When mysterious and beautiful Rebecca Thudin meets the dashing Larry Fenton, a whirlwind romance is sparked. The rich, successful pair seem to be a match made in heaven, until a murder exposes a tangled web of lies, deceit and buried secrets.

programme.title: American Monster: Sing for the Camera
programme.desc: In the summer of 2014, a peaceful community in Hartford, WI is shaken to its core when a local teenager is found dead, the victim of a brutal murder, and the second victim in two days. The community must recognize that a killer lives among them.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: When Good Meets Evil
programme.desc: John profiles Juan Lazaro Abrego, a man believed to have killed his ex-girlfriend, while Callahan investigates Derek Dean, a man accused of shooting a pair of identical twins, killing one and wounding the other.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Murder in Appalachia
programme.desc: John Walsh investigates how Eric Jones, the son of a preacher, allegedly turned to murder. Later, Callahan Walsh tries to make sense of how a dispute over a dog could provoke Ricardo Villanueva Cordova to reportedly commit murder in broad daylight.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Double Life
programme.desc: John Walsh investigates the double life of Mike Bullinger. Callahan Walsh investigates the case of Tomas Magallon Gonzalez.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Hell Hounds
programme.desc: A woman in Dayton, Ohio welcomes a young family when they move into the long derelict house next door. But escalating fights over everything from treatment of pets to treatment of children leads to a violent, bloody, and deadly confrontation.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Next Door to Crazy
programme.desc: A teacher and her son get a new start in a Las Vegas home, but soon find themselves the targets of vicious harassment and escalating intimidation by the woman who lives next door. Her fury knows no limits, and there's no telling how far she will go.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Kill Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: In Lauderdale Lakes, Florida, a single man moves into his dream home beside a single woman who is looking to start a romantic relationship with him. When he rejects her, bitter animosity ensues, followed by mutual sabotage and, eventually, gunfire.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Nail in the Coffin
programme.desc: The promise of peaceful life in Tamarac, Florida is broken when the son of a newly arrived family befriends the neighborhood's most unruly kids. Bad blood between the neighbors boils over until things come to a horrifically violent end on Halloween.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hanging by a Thread
programme.desc: Tanya Buschman is just getting out of a nasty marriage when she falls for handsome Michel Bérubé, a bartender in Montreal. But it's not long before jealousy becomes foreplay for a suspicious suicide that has friends pointing fingers at friends.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Unholy Trinity
programme.desc: Amanda and Tonch Weldon seem like the quintessential Iowa farming couple. But behind closed doors, their cravings are quite kinky. Their secret swinging lifestyle works well for years… Until one day a deadly love triangle emerges.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Crazy Love
programme.desc: Pamela and Michael fall back in love, twenty years after the high school sweethearts break up. But the issues that first drove them apart have intensified over the years—and their second chance at love turns deadly.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Nurses Lara Crockett and Ricardo Muscolino meet on the night shift. He's ambitious and sets about creating a rich life for them and she's happy to go along.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Discovering America
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the men who discovered the New World and take a trip to discover the real facts behind the most famous bridge and road in America.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Striking it Rich
programme.desc: Discover the real facts behind America's biggest economic boom and biggest bust, and learn the truth behind some of Las Vegas' greatest myths.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: Air Aces: Red Tails
programme.desc: Pressure from African-American activist groups pushed President Roosevelt to initiate a Blacks-only fighter pilot training program during WWII.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: White Mountain
programme.desc: With help from a team of friends, an avid outdoorsman takes on the challenge of building a cabin in the remote White Mountains region of Alaska. The crew must work through snow, wind and mud to haul materials and build the cabin in just seven days.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Crest
programme.desc: Builder Phil Parr heads to the wilderness of northern Colorado to build the ultimate off-grid tent. Far beyond simple nylon and poles, this lavish tent has a custom fabricated wooden frame, canvas shell and 650-square-feet of livable elegance.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Mountain Lodges
programme.desc: A Colorado couple attempts to build one of the most energy-efficient homesteads in the state. Mother Nature and bleeding edge technologies give them a run for their money as they race to complete their high-end alpine lodge before winter hits.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Blacksmith Breakroom
programme.desc: The crew build a pioneer blacksmith shop made from reclaimed beams, barnwood and rafters to serve as their office breakroom. Mark helps set up the frame, then a local blacksmith installs the forge and gives the guys an anvil lesson.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Antique barns and cabins are salvaged and the wood reused for stunning modern homes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Bank Barn Brawl
programme.desc: The builders head back to Brookville, Pennsylvania, to save the frame of a bank barn that sits dangerously close to a road. Then, Mark visits an old log lodge resort and scouts an amazing timber frame barn built in 1895.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving More than Logs in Bulls Gap, TN
programme.desc: Mark and the guys go the extra mile to save the antique logs from a Tennessee home in distress. During the job they meet Larry, who grew up in the log cabin with no running water.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Family, Bigger Beach Home
programme.desc: A couple's Dewey Beach home has become cramped and in need of reconfiguration. With a new open-concept layout, Marnie aims to preserve the integrity of the house while improving the flow and maximizing space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Save It or Sell It
programme.desc: A couple loves Lewes and the cheerful home they own there, but their two daughters have outgrown the space. Now, the family's torn between selling the house or renovating it. Marnie tries to expand the home without losing its historic charm.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: From Soaked to Saved
programme.desc: A couple has invested in a 50-year-old abandoned home in Dewey Beach, Delaware. They decide to hand the reins over to Marnie in the hopes she'll turn the fixer-upper into a safe vacation destination for their two boys.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Flood-Ridden to Fabulous
programme.desc: Due to the layout of their property, Tom and Kim's spacious backyard gets overrun by flooding during thunderstorms. They enlist Marnie to make the yard flood-proof and transform the impractical space into an outdoor living area.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Backyard Beauty
programme.desc: Being close to the water in South Bethany, Delaware means unwanted wear and tear on Jay and Christine's back deck. They enlist Marnie to update and renovate the space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Founded in 1935, Agassiz Village has provided underprivileged and at-risk kids an opportunity to experience camp. Chase and his team take on a big project with a small budget to help the camp with the support of the community.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies and fight to stay afloat in the Titanic Sundae Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Waffle Truth
programme.desc: Noah Cappe welcomes the changing of the seasons at the Circleville Pumpkin Show in Ohio, where pumpkin stars in both savory and sweet treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Aporkalypse Now

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Festival Of Fries
programme.desc: Everyone's favorite side dish takes center stage as Noah Cappe celebrates over-the-top fries loaded with every topping you could imagine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Munchies On The Go
programme.desc: The fairground wasn't made for forks and knives, so Noah Cappe is checking out the hand-held carnival treats.

programme.desc: Down in Texas and Louisiana, the bayou fairgrounds are full of rich and tasty food.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: French-American Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay adds a hint of American influence to French Bistro style dishes.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Chocolate Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby is making a brunch that features chocolate as a star ingredient. Dishes include double chocolate pancakes with salted caramel syrup and mole rubbed steak and eggs with chocolate stout beurre blanc.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Impress Your Guests
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay demonstrates how to prepare a jaw-dropping brunch without breaking a sweat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Tastes of the Tropics
programme.desc: Pastry chef phenom, Ron Ben-Israel, hangs with Michael Symon in Baton Rouge, La. to feast on a mile-high key lime pie and Caribbean-inspired brisket melt.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent Regional Dishes
programme.desc: Baton Rouge, La. native and Food Network Star finalist, Jay Ducote, joins Michael Symon for a French and Cajun-inspired burger with a twist.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Chefs' Favorite Foods
programme.desc: Earl Campbell and Michael dig into juicy brisket and warm peach cobbler at Texas' most famous barbecue restaurants.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Juicy, Crunchy and Tangy
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Lexington, Ky. for a plump pork burger and ingenious smoked chicken wings smothered in a blackberry jalapeno sauce.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eggs Men
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets the royal treatment with "ye olde eats" at the Hoggetown Medieval Faire in Gainesville, Fla. Meat is all over the menu, and Noah goes wild for the smoked bison burger and the wild boar leg.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dates on a Plane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the California desert for a date with deliciousness at the Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival. He tries spicy treats like the fire fingers kartwheel and the sonoran fire dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mad Snacks: Berry Road
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels back in time at the Texas Renaissance Festival, where the medieval-inspired meals range from the Sir Francis fry dog to the crown jewel. Then it's over to Plant City, Fla., where Noah chows down on some berry delicious carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Requiem For An Ice Cream
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls into Alabama for some country carnival cookin' at the Greater Gulf State Fair in Mobile. He digs into the dirty bird turkey leg and takes a ride on a crazy midway mashup.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fairground Showdown
programme.desc: In this all-star episode of Carnival Eats, host Noah Cappe visits California, home to some of the biggest and best fair in America.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gourmets of the Galaxy
programme.desc: The Iowa State Fair welcomes Noah Cappe with a trio of meaty masterpieces, but it's the double Dutch almond funnel that has everyone jumping with joy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Shepherd's Pie and Sunday Dinner Sundaes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off at the Big E in West Springfield, Mass., where he 'meats up' with a deconstructed Turducken Sandwich and the award-winning country fried shepherd's pie.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dumplings & Pumpkins
programme.desc: Noah's first stop is at the North Florida Fair in Tallahassee, where he feels the burn with dead heat tacos.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits St. Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive he'll need the help of a partner to take it down.
